steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The question asks for the meaning of 'deep' as used in the phrase 'more deep seclusion.' The word 'more' signals that 'deep' is intensifying the degree of withdrawal, not describing a physical property.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — Tough: Refers to a physical depth or measurement — not how 'deep' functions here emotionally. ✗
  • Choice B — Hideous: Describes a spatial or visual quality unrelated to the feeling of seclusion. ✗
  • Choice C — Complicated: Suggests obscurity or hiddenness, which is not the sense the passage conveys. ✗
  • Choice D — Intense: 'Deep seclusion' means withdrawal experienced with great emotional force — 'intense' captures that amplification exactly. ✓
That confirms D is correct.
